prompt: [Person] Image 1 [Signature] In the bottom right corner, a small Threads logo operated by Meta is located, and above it, "CHAse" is written small in white cursive like a signature. [Pose and Expression] Pose and Composition: A medium bust shot centered on the front, sensually capturing the upper body, the right shoulder line, and the shape of the fan held in the hand. Posture: Wearing the garment naturally falling to reveal the right shoulder, holding a fully unfolded black folding fan in the left hand, slightly covering the left side of the face. The upper body and head are slightly tilted to emphasize the slender neckline and collarbone. Expression: A static gaze looking indifferently down to the left rather than straight ahead. The restrained lip shape and calm mask create an alluring and mysterious aura like a scene from a classic Oriental pictorial. [Outfit and Props] Outfit: Wearing a heavy deep black Oriental kimono/yukata line robe exquisitely embroidered with brilliant pure white chrysanthemum and plum blossom patterns. Shows a chic styling that boldly exposes one shoulder. Props: Black Folding Fan: A matte black folding fan with dense bamboo rib details held in the left hand creates a contrast like an ink wash painting with the character's face. Nail Details: White and gold point tip nail art details faintly sparkling on long, pointedly trimmed nails add visual delicacy. [Hairstyle and Makeup Details] Hair: A half-up style pulled high above the crown. Thin, slender strands of deep black baby hair falling naturally along both cheeks from the part drift over the skin, creating a dreamlike sketch effect. Makeup: Created a semi-matte porcelain skin base where highlights and shadows blend smoothly. The eyes are matched with sophisticated black cat-eye eyeliner with slightly raised corners and deep shading shadows, and the lips are finished with a matte lip in a calm nude dried rose (Brick Rose) tone that enhances the natural complexion. [Lighting and Direction] Light Source: Strong direct pin lighting (Key Light) in amber/golden orange tones hitting diagonally from the top right of the figure (left side of the screen) intensely and warmly. Effect: Chiaroscuro technique is applied to form intense and warm light highlights on the left side of the face, shoulder line, and parts of the background where the light hits strongly, while the right side where light doesn't reach falls into deep, attractive shadows, creating dramatic three-dimensionality. [Texture and Color Mood (Core Texture Details)] Color: A 'Cinematic Oriental Shadow' color mood where warm gold in the light-hit areas, toned-down deep olive khaki/brown in the background, and absolute deep black (Jet Black) of the clothing and fan meet the snow white of the embroidery. Texture Details (Special Analysis): Fabric Texture: Dense embroidery thread texture where the three-dimensionality of each thread can be felt while the silk-cotton blend robe remains matte. Prop Texture: Regular intervals and concave shadow grain of the fan paper/bamboo ribs. Skin and Luster Texture: Soft skin texture and sharp melodies of hair strands created by pin lighting hitting a matte skin that is smooth like porcelain but excludes artificial luster. Grain Noise: Fine high-resolution analog film grain noise spread throughout the screen blends with the plaster texture of the background like a velvet wall to complete a texture like an oil painting. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] Composition and Angle: A horizontal composition capturing the character's impression and Oriental objects horizontally without distortion from a position close to the subject's eye level. Features: Very shallow depth of field (Shallow DoF) of a top-tier portrait lens is applied. Sharp focus is placed like a blade on the character's left eye, face line, and the rib details of the fan held in the hand, while the textured wall in the back where light passes diagonally and the background beyond the right shoulder are softly blurred (out-focused) to maximize immersion into the character. [Background and Studio Layout Elements] Space: An antique and toned-down vintage studio background where the grain of time is felt. Details: Behind the character, a fine plaster/stone texture wall in deep olive brown tones is placed, and the light coming from the left leaves a diagonal gradient highlight on one side of the wall, giving even the empty space a pictorial depth.

promptZh: [人物] 图像 1 [签名] 右下角有一个由 Meta 运营的小型 Threads 标志，其上方用白色草书小字写着“CHAse”作为签名。[姿势与表情] 姿势与构图：居中的半身像，感性地捕捉了上半身、右肩线条以及手中折扇的轮廓。姿势：穿着自然垂落的服装露出右肩，左手持一把完全展开的黑色折扇，略微遮住脸部左侧。上半身和头部微微倾斜，以突显纤细的颈部和锁骨。表情：目光静止，冷漠地看向左下方，而非直视前方。克制的唇形和冷静的神态营造出一种如同经典东方画报场景般迷人而神秘的氛围。[服装与道具] 服装：穿着一件厚重的深黑色东方和服/浴衣长袍，上面精致地绣有绚烂的纯白色菊花和梅花图案。展现出大胆露出一侧肩膀的时髦造型。道具：黑色折扇：左手持一把带有细密竹骨细节的哑光黑色折扇，与人物面部形成如同水墨画般的对比。指甲细节：长而修剪尖锐的指甲上，点缀着淡淡闪烁的白金尖端美甲，增添了视觉上的精致感。[发型与妆容细节] 发型：头顶上方高扎的半扎发造型。从发缝处自然垂落在双颊旁的深黑色细碎发丝掠过肌肤，营造出梦幻般的素描效果。妆容：打造出半哑光的瓷肌底妆，高光与阴影平滑融合。眼妆搭配精致的黑色猫眼眼线，眼角微微上扬并带有深邃的阴影，唇妆则选用冷静的裸色干枯玫瑰（砖红色）哑光唇釉，提升自然气色。[光影与指导] 光源：强烈的定向聚光灯（主光）以琥珀色/金橙色调从人物右上方（画面左侧）强烈而温暖地照射。效果：运用明暗对照法，在脸部左侧、肩线以及光线强烈照射的背景部分形成强烈而温暖的光影高光，而未受光照的右侧则陷入深邃迷人的阴影中，营造出戏剧性的立体感。[质感与色彩氛围（核心质感细节）] 色彩：“电影感东方光影”色彩氛围，受光区域的暖金色、背景中调低的深橄榄卡其/棕色，以及服装和折扇的绝对深黑色（喷气黑）与刺绣的雪白色交织。质感细节（特别分析）：织物质感：丝棉混纺长袍保持哑光的同时，能感受到每一根绣线的立体纹理。道具质感：折扇纸面/竹骨的规律间距与凹陷阴影纹理。皮肤与光泽质感：聚光灯照射在如瓷器般平滑但剔除人工光泽的哑光皮肤上，呈现出柔软的皮肤质感和发丝的锐利韵律。颗粒噪点：遍布画面的精细高分辨率模拟胶片颗粒噪点，与如同天鹅绒墙面般的背景石膏质感融合，呈现出油画般的质感。[胶片与相机镜头景深、角度] 构图与角度：水平构图，从接近主体视平线的位置水平捕捉人物印象和东方物件，无畸变。特性：应用了顶级人像镜头极浅的景深（Shallow DoF）。焦点如刀锋般精准地落在人物左眼、脸部轮廓以及手中折扇的扇骨细节上，而光线斜射的后方纹理墙面以及右肩后的背景则被柔和地虚化（背景虚化），以最大化沉浸感。[背景与摄影棚布局元素] 空间：一个能感受到岁月痕迹的复古且色调低沉的摄影棚背景。细节：人物后方是一面深橄榄棕色的精细石膏/石材纹理墙，从左侧射入的光线在墙面一侧留下了对角渐变高光，即使是留白空间也赋予了画报般的深度。
